Your AI Financial Advisor
Ask me anything about your finances, retirement timeline, where to retire, or travel budget.
Share a snapshot
Connect Bank Account
Connect via Open Banking (PSD2) to pull real transaction data, or enter manual transactions for a demo view.

Supported banks: SEB, Swedbank, Handelsbanken, Nordea, Danske Bank, and all EU PSD2 banks.
Open Banking (PSD2)Requires bank credentials
Manual / Demo ModePre-loaded sample data

CSV works with exports from most banks — upload, map the columns, and preview before committing. Live PSD2 requires your bank to support it; credentials are passed directly to your bank and never stored here.

Import transactions from CSV
Upload a CSV export from your bank. Most banks offer this under Statements or Export transactions. We'll preview the rows and let you map columns before anything lands in your library.
🪪
Welcome to Horizon Finance OS
To get started, please set your Citizenship and Home Base in Settings. These are required for personalised AI analysis across the app — tax implications, pension entitlements, visa eligibility, and cost-of-living comparisons are all tailored to your specific situation.
This message will reappear on every tab until both fields are completed.
